title: ListBucketResult
description: Container for the result of the ListObjectsV2 operation.

IsTruncated.description: Set to false if all of the results were returned. Set to true if more keys are available to return.

Prefix.description: Keys that begin with the indicated prefix.

Delimiter.description: Causes keys that contain the same string between the prefix and the first occurrence of the delimiter to be rolled up into a single result element.

MaxKeys.description: Sets the maximum number of keys returned in the response.

EncodingType.description: Encoding type used by Amazon S3 to encode object key names.

KeyCount.description: The number of keys returned with this request.

ContinuationToken.description: If ContinuationToken was sent with the request, it is included in the response.

NextContinuationToken.description: NextContinuationToken is sent when isTruncated is true, which indicates that there are more keys to return.

StartAfter.description: If StartAfter was sent with the request, it is included in the response.
